Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 62 

EXCLUDED_TIER_GAP 

LABEL: Indicates Whether Excluded Drugs are Covered on this Tier in the Gap Phase 

DESCRIPTION: For Enhanced Alternative plans that cover excluded drugs as a supplemental benefit, this variable 
Indicates whether the Part D plan provides coverage on this tier during the coverage gap phase. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES:
